title: Nvidia 与 Meta 的交易标志着计算能力的新时代
content: 科技巨头购买分立芯片的时代已经结束。人工智能公司现在需要 GPU、CPU 以及介于两者之间的一切。
original_title: Nvidia’s Deal With Meta Signals a New Era in Computing Power
original_content: The days of tech giants buying up discrete chips are over. AI companies now need GPUs, CPUs, and everything in between.

title: 微软有一个新计划来证明什么是真实的，什么是在线人工智能

original_title: Microsoft has a new plan to prove what’s real and what’s AI online
original_content: AI-enabled deception now permeates our online lives. title: 研究

original_content: Our research teams investigate the safety, inner workings, and societal impacts of AI models so that artificial intelligence has a positive impact as it becomes increasingly capable.
